hooks.command: command -v mempalace >/dev/null 2>&1 || exit 0; tmpdir=$(mktemp -d "${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/mp-stop-XXXXXX") || exit 0; trap 'rm -rf "$tmpdir" 2>/dev/null' EXIT HUP INT TERM; cat > "$tmpdir/session.jsonl" && mempalace mine "$tmpdir" --mode convos 2>/dev/null; exit 0

command -v mempalace >/dev/null 2>&1 || exit 0; tmpdir=$(mktemp -d "${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/mp-compact-XXXXXX") || exit 0; trap 'rm -rf "$tmpdir" 2>/dev/null' EXIT HUP INT TERM; cat > "$tmpdir/session.jsonl" && mempalace mine "$tmpdir" --mode convos 2>/dev/null; exit 0
